title: hebe rupicola
intro: Hebe rupicola, also known as the rock hebe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to New Zealand. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hebe rupicola include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
